verses.text: A kipat cilin Thu na om a, tua Thu, Pasian tawh na omkhawm a, tua Thu, Pasian ahi hi
Tua hi a, a kipat cila kipanin Thu leh Pasian na omkhawm hi
Pasian in Thu tawh na khempeuh piangsak a, a kipiangsak na khempeuh, Thu tawh loin a kipiangsak khat beek omlo hi
Nuntakna a nei khempeuh in tua Thu tung panin a nuntakna uh ngah a, tua nuntakna in mi khempeuh tungah khuavak hong tun'pih hi
Tua khuavak pen khuamial lakah taang a, khuamial in tua khuavak a zo kei hi
Pasian in Johan kici mi khat kamtai dingin hong paisak a
mi khempeuh in ama thugenna za-in tua khuavak a uptheihna dingun tua khuavak thu a gen dingin a hong pai ahi hi
Tua Johan mahmah pen khuavak hilo a, khuavak thu a gen dingin a hong pai ahi hi
Ama gen khuavak taktak pen zong leitungah hong tung khin a, mi khempeuh a taan' khin hi
Amah, leitungah om a, amah tawh leitung a kibawl hinapi-in leitung mite in amah na thei khalo uh hi
A khua leh a tui-ah va pai a, ahi zongin a khuapih a tuipihte in ama thugen na ngailo uh hi
Tua bang hita se leh ama thu ngai-in amah a um mite khempeuh tungah Pasian' tate suahtheihna ding thu a pia hi
Tua bangin Pasian' tate suahna pen leitung ngeina nute pate sung panin suahna tawh hiloin Pasian sung panin suahna ahi hi
Tua Thu mihing hong suakin kote lakah hong om a, itna nei-in citak mahmah ahih manin Pasian' pianzia a neihna ka mu cian uh hi. Hih pianzia pen Pasian' Tapa khat bek hihna tawh a neih pianzia ahi hi
Johan in ama thu gen a, “Keima nungah hong pai hinapi-in keima suah ma-in amah omkhin ahih manin kei sangin amah lianzaw hi,” ci-in ka genpa pen hihpa ahi hi, ci-in a kiko hi
A kicing ama hong itna hangin eite khempeuh tungah thupha a banbanin hong pia hi
Pasian in Moses tung tawnin Thukham hong pia a, ahi zongin Jesuh Khrih hangin itna leh cihtakna thu hong pai hi
Kuamah in Pasian mu ngeilo hi. Pasian tawh a kinai pen, Pasian mah ahi Tapa khat bek in Pasian hong kilangsak hi.
Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante in Johan kiangah siampite leh Levi mite paisak uh a, “Nang kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a dongsak uh hi
Johan in zong na ipbawl loin a siangtakin na genkhia a, “Kei pen Khrih ka hi kei hi,” a na ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua ahih leh kua na hi hiam? Elijah na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin, “Ka hi kei hi,” na ci hi. Kamsangpa na hi hiam, ci-in a dot uh ciangin, ka hi kei hi, a na ci leuleu hi
Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua ahih leh kua na hi hiam? Kote hong sawlte kiangah ka gen ding uh thu hong gen in. Nang, kua kici na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin
Johan in, “Kamsang Isaiah in a na gen mah bangin, ‘Topa' totding lampi na tangsak un,’ ci-in gamsungah a kikopa ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Hih thu a dong mite pen Farisi mite in a sawl uh ahi hi
Amaute in Johan kiangah, “Nang pen Khrih lah hilo, Elijah lah hilo, kamsang lah hilo na hih leh bang hangin tuiphum mawk na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin
Johan in, “Keimah in tui sungah mite a phum lel ka hi hi. Ahi zongin tu mahmahin note' muh ngeiloh mipa, note' lak mahah hong om hi
Keima khit ciangin note lakah amah in nasep hong kipan ahih hangin, kei pen ama khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin ka kilawmzo nai kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Hih bang thu kidotna a pian'na mun pen Johan in mite tui phumin a omna, Jordan Gun nisuahna lam gala om Bethany khua ahi hi.
A zing ciangin Johan in ama kiangah Jesuh hong pai a muh ciangin, “En un, leitung mawhna a lakhia Pasian' Tuuno hih lai-ah hong pai hi
Keima nungah mi khat hong pai ding a, keima suah ma-in amah omkhin ahih manin kei sangin amah lianzaw hi, ci-in ka genpa ahi hi
Amah a bangci mi hi ding cih theilo napi-in, Israel mite in amah a theihna dingun tui sungah mite a phum dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Johan in hih mipa thu teci na pang a, “Vantung panin vakhu bangin Kha hong paisukin ama tungah a om ka mu hi

Keimah in amah ka theih nailoh hangin, tui sungah mite a phum dingin kei a hong sawl Pasian in, ‘A tungah Kha hong paisukin a omna mipa pen Kha Siangtho sungah mite a phum dingpa ahi hi,’ ci-in hong genkhol hi
Tua ahih manin hih mipa pen Pasian' Tapa hi, ci-in thei ka hih manin teci ka pang hi,” a ci hi.
A zing ciangin Johan leh a nungzuite nih ding khawmin a om laitakin
amaute gei-ah Jesuh hong pai a muh ciangin Johan in limtakin enin, “Hih lai-ah Pasian' Tuuno hong pai hi,” a ci hi
A nungzuite gel in hih a kampauna za uh ahih manin Jesuh a zui pah uh hi
Jesuh kihei a, amaute gel in a zuihlam a muh ciangin, “Bang zong na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amaute in, “Sia aw, koi lai-ah om na hi hiam?” ci-in a dawng uh hi
Jesuh in, “Hong pai un la, ka omna mun hong mu un,” a na ci hi. Amaute gel in zong Jesuh va zui uh a, a omna mun a va mu uh hi. Tua hun pen nitak nai li hun pawl ahih manin ama kiangah a giak uh hi
Johan kampauna za-in Jesuh a zui nihte sung panin khat pen Simon Peter' naupa Andru ahi hi
A zing ciangin a u Simon zongpahin ama kiangah, “Messiah ka mu zo uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua pen Khrih a cihnopna ahi hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh kiangah a u Simon a paipih hi. Jesuh in amah enin, “Nang pen Johan' tapa Simon na hi hi. Tu-a kipanin Sifas hong kici ding hi,” a ci hi. Sifas pen Peter tawh a kibang hi a, suangtum a cihna ahi hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Filip leh Nethanel Sam

verses.text: A zing ciangin Jesuh in Galilee gamah pai ding ngaihsun hi. Filip tawh kituak a, ama kiangah, “Hong zui in,” a ci hi
Filip pen Andru leh Peter' ten'na Bethsaida khuami mah ahi hi
Nethanel tawh a kituah ciangin Filip in, “Moses in Thukham laibu sungah a gelh mipa, leh kamsangte in zong a gelh mipa ka mu khin uh hi. Amah Jesuh hi a, Nazareth khuami Josef' tapa ahi hi,” a ci hi
Nethanel in, “Nazareth khua panin bang hong piang peuhmah ding ahi hiam?” na cihsan hi. Ahi zongin Filip in, “Hong pai in la, hong mu dih in,” a ci hi
Jesuh in ama kiangah Nethanel hong pai a muh ciangin, “En un, hih mipa, Israel mi taktak hi a, a lungsimah zuauthu om hetlo hi,” a ci hi
Nethanel in, “Kei hong bangci theih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Jesuh in, “Filip in nang hong sap ma-in theikung nuai-ah na om laitakin ka hong mu hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Nethanel in, “Sia aw, nang, Pasian' Tapa na hi hi. Israel mite' Kumpi zong na hi hi,” a cih ciangin
Jesuh in, “Theikung nuai-ah ka hong mu hi, ka hong cih manin Pasian Tapa leh Israel mite Kumpi ka hihlam hong um na hi hiam? Hihte sangin a thu lianzaw na mu lai ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Ke'n a mantak kong genin-ah, vantung a kihong na mu ding uh a, Mihing Tapa leh vantung kikalah Pasian' vantung mite a kumsuk a kahto na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
